summary: Restructured opening paragraph to eliminate scaffold collision with Chapter 10. Both chapters opened with 'The [noun] was [description]' (Ch9: 'The car was a gray Hyundai...', Ch10: 'The bar was called Mooney’s...'). Rewrote Ch9's opening to use a character-action entry ('Dan adjusted the rearview mirror and caught the coffee stain...') while preserving all narrative information, sensory detail, and Dan's stress-tell cataloging of irrelevant physical specifics. Entry seam (Ch8→Ch9) and exit seam (Ch9→Ch10) were already continuous and required no changes: Ch8's predicted morning routine echoes into Ch9's morning scene; Ch9's withholding from Mira rhymes with Ch10's withholding from Dan; Theo's headphones motif carries across all three chapters.
edits: Rewrote opening paragraph from 'The car was a gray Hyundai...' to 'Dan adjusted the rearview mirror and caught the coffee stain...' to avoid structural scaffold collision with Ch10's 'The bar was called Mooney’s...' opening
